title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to RevOps automation with smarter runbook generation that learns from your team's processes, enhanced revenue field detection for better Salesforce assessments, and streamlined Windows setup. We also added comprehensive deployment safety checks to prevent configuration errors and strengthened security with automated credential scanning.

entries.headline: Fixed Salesforce automation builder reliability issues
Intelligent runbook creation learns from your team's processes
details: OpsPal now automatically generates step-by-step runbooks by observing how your team completes tasks
Creates reusable process documentation with confidence scoring
Builds a knowledge base that improves recommendations over time

entries.headline: Salesforce automation routing works more reliably
HubSpot and Marketo operations now provide execution tracking
details: All platform operations now generate audit trails for compliance
Better visibility into what changes were made and when

entries.headline: Production environment safety controls enhanced
details: Read-only operations no longer trigger unnecessary safety warnings
Clearer policies for different types of production activities

entries.headline: Automated release notes keep you informed of platform updates
details: Weekly summaries of new features and improvements
Plain-language descriptions of technical changes that affect your work

entries.headline: Salesforce permission management works more smoothly
details: Reduced unnecessary validation blocks for routine operations
Better handling of permission set assignments
Improved automation for bulk data operations

entries.headline: Simple Salesforce record lookups run faster
details: Quick verification queries no longer require complex routing
Faster response times for single-record checks

entries.headline: Windows setup now installs all required tools automatically
details: One-click installation of Claude Code, Node.js, and other dependencies
Streamlined onboarding experience for Windows users

entries.headline: Better error detection and reporting for Salesforce connections
details: Platform now detects authentication issues earlier
Clearer error messages when Salesforce connections fail

entries.headline: Salesforce assessments now capture revenue context for better insights
Customizable templates and branding that survive platform updates
details: Create custom templates and brand assets that persist through upgrades
Flexible customization system for different teams and environments

entries.headline: RevOps assessments automatically detect your revenue fields and sales stages
details: Identifies custom revenue fields beyond standard Amount
Analyzes sales process stages for better pipeline insights
Works with custom fields like ARR, ACV, and recurring revenue

entries.headline: Smoother initial setup and project detection
Advanced deployment safety checks prevent Salesforce configuration errors
details: Validates picklist values against record types before deployment
Checks field history tracking limits to prevent data loss
Automatically merges duplicate configuration settings

entries.headline: Automated scanning prevents accidental credential exposure
Enhanced security scanning integrated into development workflow
Removed embedded credentials for improved security
Salesforce deployment validation works more accurately
details: Fixed issues with flow logic analysis
Better detection of field reference problems
Improved validation of decision logic in automations
